text: UAE Federal Decree-Law No.6 expands regulated activities to include open finance and virtual asset payments
CBUAE grants one-year reconciliation period until September 16 2026 for affected financial institutions
DFSA crypto token regulatory framework major updates take effect January 12 2026
UAE Securities regulator rebrands as Capital Market Authority effective January 1 2026
CMA issues new guidelines regulating virtual assets and virtual asset service providers in UAE
Kudo.com receives UAE licence on June 9 2026 supporting GCC expansion strategy
Saudi Arabia expects fintech market consolidation with mergers exits and stricter licensing ahead
SAMA launches public consultation on updated payment systems oversight framework December 2025
Systemically important Saudi payment systems required to conduct minimum annual compliance self-assessments
Saudi Arabia joins BIS mBridge CBDC project now reaching minimum viable product stage
